title: Preserve Group 21 status: G21-11: parent equation status
description: Result: Group 21 sharpened mass-routing obligations but did not define a parent field equation. Status: THEOREM_TARGET. Consequence: parent equation remains not ready. Handoff: do not insert O, H, J_V, Sigma/R, zeta/kappa scalar routes, curvature currents, or dark labels into a parent equation from this group alone.
